name: Voice message describing a deck build
description: User sends a voice note (transcribed by the backend). Assistant should treat the transcription identically to text and draft a quote.

user.content: Okay so for the Browning job we're looking at a 10 by 14 deck — uh, composite boards, going to be about three thousand two hundred for materials, and labor's twenty-five hundred. Throw in three hundred for permits.
